name: creator-hub
description: Decentralized platform for hiring and rewarding creators on Stellar blockchain

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../contracts && cargo build
scripts.dev: concurrently 'npm run dev -w frontend' 'npm run dev -w backend'
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
scripts.format: npm run format -w frontend && npm run format -w backend && cargo fmt
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
